blockPalette.name: hero
blockPalette.description: Full-width hero banner with background image, heading, and description text
blockPalette.contentModel: Standalone: Row 1 = image, Row 2 = heading + description text. H1 for main heading, H2 for subheading, paragraphs for description.

blockPalette.name: cards
blockPalette.description: Grid of content items with optional images/icons, headings, and descriptions
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row = one card. Column 1 = image/icon (optional), Column 2 = heading + description text. H3 for card title.

blockPalette.name: carousel
blockPalette.description: Horizontally scrolling content panels for product displays and before/after comparisons
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row = one slide. Column 1 = image, Column 2 = title + description text.

blockPalette.name: columns
blockPalette.description: Side-by-side content in 2 or 3 columns for image+text layouts
blockPalette.contentModel: Standalone: Single row with 2-3 cells. Each cell contains any combination of images, headings, paragraphs, and links.

blockPalette.name: tabs
blockPalette.description: Tabbed interface for organizing related content panels (female/male treatment areas)
blockPalette.contentModel: Auto-blocked: Section with multiple H2 headings creates tabs. Each H2 becomes a tab label, content below becomes tab panel.

blockPalette.name: accordion
blockPalette.description: Expandable Q&A sections for FAQ content
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row = one item. Column 1 = question/trigger text, Column 2 = answer/expanded content.

siteConventions.headerNavigation: Dropdown menu with Behandeling and FAQ categories plus CTA button
siteConventions.footerStructure: Treatment links, FAQ links, legal links, social media (Instagram, Facebook), warning message, disclaimer text

commonElements.clinicFinderWidget: Present on homepage and all treatment pages as section-level default content. Contains heading, location input, and CTA button.
commonElements.referencesSection: Medical references as ordered list at bottom of content pages
commonElements.warningBanner: Footer warning: 'Kijk uit. Jezelf mooier maken kan lelijk uitpakken.' with icon
commonElements.beforeAfterPattern: Paired images with 'Voor'/'Na' labels in carousel
commonElements.treatmentAreaTabs: Reusable tabs component with female/male variants, appearing on homepage and all treatment pages - candidate for fragment

siteConventions.imageHandling: All images from Adobe Dynamic Media (dm-aid URLs). Use original URLs with preferwebp=true&quality=85 parameters.
siteConventions.disclaimerText: Required medical device disclaimer and AbbVie copyright at bottom of all pages
